how: Added profile avatar preprocessing, POST /api/me/avatar and DELETE /api/me/avatar consumers, nickname-only profile update serialization, shared Avatar fallback rendering, My Page avatar controls, and feed/comment author avatar consumption with unit/regression/smoke coverage.
problem: Backend/Admin shipped the profile avatar storage and API contract, but Web Front still did not consume POST /api/me/avatar, DELETE /api/me/avatar, or authorProfileImage fields.
remainingGap: TSK-018-01 audit and TSK-018-05 traceability remain open for parent-level evidence closure.
why: Profile avatar is a provider-backed user feature, so Web Front needed to consume the deployed Worker contract without creating a large placeholder profile image area or bypassing the Worker API.
